transcript.text:
[Fresh Kimchi]
[Bossam is a must!]
[With fresh oysters]
[But this much?!]
[Let's do it the right way]
-You can't finish it -Yeah, you can't
I'm going to need 20 servings
[Your stomach will explode]
[White rice]
[Forreal..?]
[I still have a lot of room left]
Aren't you full? [Nope]
I approve
[Same]
[Just how much did she eat..?]
Hello everyone

I'm here at Chungmu-ro today
I saw on the TV recently
A lot of people are starting to prepare their kimchi with bossam because it's WInter
I have finally come here to eat some bossam (boiled pork belly wraps)
This place has been here for more than 30 years
[Seoul, Jung-gu] [Paldo Bossam]
Hello~!
What to eat?
They have fresh oysters
Bossam is usually expensive, but the rates are pretty low
Excuse me
12 servings of bossam set, please
Just 4 plates of kimchi, please So that I don't leave leftovers
How will you eat all of that?
Just eat 2 servings
No no, 12, please

Right, Excuse me, 1 order of fresh oysters too, please
['Tis the season to prepare kimchi in South Korea]
[Check the red-goodness out!]
[Korean=Kimchi]
[Is it my turn?]
[Such clear skin]
[You can't forget about bossam during Kimchi season]
[Fresh oysters are important too!]
Oysters! Thank you
[How will you eat all of this...]
-You can't finish it -Yeah, you can't
[Meal is served]
This is the bossam set
It comes with white rice and side dishes, but there's no space here
So I just asked for the meat and kimchi first
Bon appetit

Just take a look at this fat
I love it
Fresh kimchi colors It almost looks fake
On top
Oyster too
This is going to be great
The pork fat just melts right away
This kimchi is so sweet and tasty
I feel like I'm going to eat all of it I usually don't finish all the kimchi
Kimchi is a must here
With some oysters
Incredible
These 3 items have to be eaten together Really
Kimchi and pork takes all the fishiness from the oysters
Is it because it's oyster season?
It's not fishy at all

I don't eat oysters if they're fishy
It must be oyster season
So good
Dip the pork belly in ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste)
The meat is really juicy
The fat is very soft
I'm going to need 20 servings
The roof of my mouth
It hurts so much because I was eating something very hot last night and it got burned
But I can't stop because the food is delicious
Dip some salted shrimp here
[Are you really eating all of that?]
I love kimchi so much
[1 plate down already]
It's different from grilled pork belly
It just feels more healthy It probably isn't

Anything grilled in grease is worse, no?
Let's just eat
[Who cares]
Kimchi with meat
Bossam burger
The perfect ratio
Kimchi
And fresh oysters
[She finds it funny too]
There are thinly sliced radish pieces in here
The roof of my mouth
It's sweet, but
It's kinda spicy if you eat a lot
I thought you ordered a lot just to film something really quick
But it surprises me that you're eating it all
I'm not finished yet

It seems like you're going to finish it all
Do you think I can get my rice and side dishes now?
Thank you
[Home-food side dishes]
Thank you
[Seaweed soup and white rice]
[Kimchi with rice]
It's good with rice too
I love this
Soup and rice is always great
[Bossam and kimchi over rice]
It tastes even better with rice
[Lettuce wrap too!]
Greasy and juicy bossam like this is so much better than
bossam that are non-greasy and dry
Kimchi inside the lettuce

Oysters too
When the food first came out, I didn't think it will fill me up
It looks like it will now that I have rice, soup, and side dishes
Excuse me
1 more seaweed soup, please
Hot hot hot hot
[She's weak to hotness and spiciness]
[Leave leftovers if you're full]
[I won't get tired]
I don't think this will fill me up
This is a big one
Can I do it?
It's too big
[Why were you worried?]
[Culture shock]
I only typed "Tzu" and it pops up

[Checking her subscribers]
[Amazing...]
[Yes, really amazing oral structure]
Excuse me,
1 more rice, please
-1 more rice? -Yes
Thank you
This seaweed soup is very tasty
The soup is very savory
She must've cooked it for a long time
Why do I only have 1 plate left?
I didn't even start
Let's dip it in ssamjang this time
Tastes better than grilled pork belly
No
Grilled it good, and bossam is good too

This was so good that I almost disappointed grilled pork belly
It's pre-dinner hours right now
And the restaurant is already filled up
Excuse me
1 more soup, please
Aren't you full?
Not at all
Thank you
[Just bossam+ssamjang+oyster?]
It's not as good without kimchi
There are thinly sliced radish inside
It's filled in and cut up
So it has a lovely texture
Only 2 pieces left I want more
[She ate all of that?]
Everyone stops to take a glance

I approve
[She's gotten the owner's recognition]
I've been acknowledged
Oysters
You're really good at eating
Keep doing mukbang and become more famous
Thank you
Thanks everyone!
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
